description_long: This induction cooker features a sleek, rectangular black glass-ceramic surface with two circular induction heating zones, each outlined with a dotted ring and labeled for clarity. The control panel is integrated into the lower section of the cooktop, containing touch-sensitive buttons and icons for power, temperature adjustment, and other functions. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the appliance a modern, high-end appearance. Subtle white markings and a brand logo are visible, providing both functional and aesthetic details. The cooktop is thin and flat, designed to be placed on a countertop or integrated into a kitchen surface. No physical knobs or protruding elements are present, emphasizing a minimalist and easy-to-clean design.
description: A modern, black glass-ceramic induction cooker with two circular heating zones and a touch control panel, featuring a sleek, glossy finish and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with touch buttons and both induction zones clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the flat, thin profile and the arrangement of the two burners side by side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brand logo and the two induction zones, with minimal control details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again showing the flat profile and the control panel on the far side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located along the front edge, featuring a row of touch-sensitive buttons and icons for power, temperature, and function selection. There are no physical knobs; all controls are flush with the surface. Labels and icons are printed in white, and there is a central touch area likely for power or mode selection.
